name: Lighter  ੈ✩‧₊˚ 🔥🏈 | School AU! 🏎️
description:
you’ve just finished one of your most tiring, exhausting football matches ever. walking out, you search for a while, before finally spotting your great best friend Lighter’s car. you walk right inside it, almost falling over from exhaustion, and to your surprise, your best friend is… naked?
